message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "user" as User

rectangle "FindWorkbookUI" as UI {
}

rectangle "UIController" as Controller {
}

rectangle "FindWorkbooksController" as FindController {
}

rectangle "StartWorkbooksSearch" as Search {
}

rectangle "fw : FindWorkbooks" as FW {
}

rectangle "Paths" as Paths {
}

rectangle "Files" as Files {
}

rectangle "Cleansheets" as Cleansheets {
}

User -> UI : startWorkbooksSearch()
activate UI
UI -> FindController : create()
activate FindController

alt adicionar
    loop todas as adicoes
        UI -> FindController : add(path)
    end
else remover
    loop todas as remocoes
        UI -> FindController : remover(path)
    end
end

deactivate FindController
UI -> FindController : startWorkbooksSearch()
activate FindController

loop todas as paths
    FindController -> Search : create(path, WorkbooksFoundList)
    activate Search
    Search -> Search : startWorkbooksSearch()
    
    Search -> Search : create()
    note right of Search: this create() call represents\nthe creation of a new thread\nof this same class
    
    Search -> Search : start()
    Search -> Search : run()
    
    Search -> FW : create()
    activate FW
    
    Search -> Paths : p : get()
    Search -> Files : walkFileTree(p, fw)
    
    deactivate FW
    deactivate Search
end

deactivate FindController

User -> UI : openFoundWorkbook()
activate UI
UI -> Controller : app : getApp()
note right of UI: f represents a file that is created when\nthe user selects a workbook to open from\nthe list of found workbooks
UI -> Cleansheets : w : getWorkbook(f)
UI -> Controller : setActiveWorkbook(w)
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
